title: Has Strategy’s capital overhaul put an end to ‘death spiral’ fears?
summary: Strategy's latest plan includes MSTR and STRC buybacks, expanded cash reserves and even potential Bitcoin sales. Will it be enough to defuse the overheated “death spiral” fears?

title: Bitcoin just $5K away from ‘best investment opportunity’ of bear market
summary: Bitcoin's recent selloff brought it within 10% of its realized price — a line that has marked the bottoming zone in Bitcoin's previous bear markets.

title: Oil Steadies as Peace Talks Continue, Hormuz Traffic Recovers
summary: Oil steadied after the biggest quarterly drop since the pandemic, as traders monitored peace talks between the US and Iran and the return of shipping through the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Alcoa Bets on Aluminum Boom With $5.6 Billion South32 Deal
summary: Alcoa Corp. has agreed to buy South32 Ltd.’s bauxite, alumina and aluminum assets in a deal worth as much as $5.6 billion, cementing its position as a top producer as long-term demand strengthens and the Iran war exposes supply concerns.

President Donald Trump's 2025 financial disclosure revealed more than $50 million in self-custodied Bitcoin held in cold storage and over $1 billion in crypto-related reported revenue and proceed

title: Anchorage Digital and Binance Launch Off-Exchange Settlement for Institutional Crypto Trading
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Anchorage Digital and Binance Launch Off-Exchange Settlement for Institutional Crypto Trading
Anchorage Digital and Binance launched off-exchange settlement for institutional crypto trading, allowing institutions to trade on Binance while keeping their assets in segregated custody

title: Trump Discloses Over $1.2 Billion in Crypto Earnings, $50M in Bitcoin Holdings
summary: The president’s annual financial disclosure report was released on Tuesday.

title: Binance, Changpeng Zhao Sued for $200M by British Investors: Reuters
summary: Crypto exchange Binance and its founder were sued for nearly $200 million in a new lawsuit filed in the United Kingdom.

title: Million-dollar homes, luxury bags and Lamborghinis: Florida man pleads guilty in crypto fraud scheme
summary: A man pleaded guilty to fraud charges after prosecutors said he tricked people into the promise of making returns in crypto liquidity pools.

title: President Trump’s financial disclosures show hundreds of millions in crypto-related income
summary: Trump disclosed over $65 million from equity sales and $236 million in World Liberty token proceeds.

title: Donald Trump made more than $1bn last year in return to presidency
summary: US president also earned hundreds of thousands of dollars from licensing of Bibles, watches and perfume while in office

title: Comcast’s ‘amicable divorce’ unwinds Hollywood’s corporate experiment
summary: NBCUniversal split sparks talk of future deals amid ongoing media and entertainment consolidation
